name: Spargelgemuse (Fresh Asparagus)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the asparagus spears and trim off the tough ends.
2. Place the asparagus in boiling salted water and cook until tender, about 7 to 10 minutes.
3. Drain the liquid from the asparagus.
4. In a small saucepan, melt the butter over low heat until lightly browned.
5. Sprinkle the grated Parmesan cheese over the melted butter and mix well.
6. Spoon the cheese mixture over the asparagus.
7. Garnish with slices of the hard-boiled egg.
